gpu_published_estimate.source: xgboost release notes + dmlc/xgboost benchmark suite 2023-2024; typical speedup for small-matrix hist (n<=10k rows) is 2-5x, with 10x seen on larger datasets (n>=100k). Our matrix is 455 rows so gains are expected at the low end.
gpu_published_estimate.note: No measurement produced in-sandbox; this is a published-estimate placeholder. Measure on Colab and overwrite with a measured number.
